title: Arrabidaea dichotoma

The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory issues, attributed to its potential to reduce oxidative stress and promote relaxation. The bioactive constituents of Arrabidaea dichotoma include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The plant is often used to prepare teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly consumed to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and other stress-related disorders.
